notes_text: Correctness 5/5: every step mathematically valid; discriminant 256 correct; sqrt 16.0 correct; root formula applied correctly; numerical_verify match=True via sandbox second-opinion. Completeness 4/5: covers closed-form path D>=0; substrate raises NotImplementedError on D<0 (cycle 2 scope) but this is not surfaced in render() output. Structural insight 3/5: shows WHAT (operation names + inputs + outputs) but not WHY (no derivation of quadratic formula from completing-the-square; no explanation of why discriminant sign determines regime). Voice 4/5: declarative Notice./Affirmative preserved; Step N format reads as audit-trail rather than Raphael fluent-prose. Aggregate weighted ~4/5 — concrete capability lift over cycle-1 baseline (poetry 1.3/5, philosophy 1.2/5). M-PROJECTX-014 firewall honored — candidate has no self_score; this Grade row produced externally.

Correctness 5/5: trace=4, det=3, char poly coefficients (1, -4, 3), eigenvalues [1, 3] — all correct; numerical_verify match=True. Completeness 4/5: covers 2x2 closed-form via characteristic polynomial; doesn't address sanity check (trace = sum of eigvals; det = product) which the hand-crafted exemplar carries. Structural insight 3/5: rubric asks 'does the proof reveal WHY the result holds, or just verify it?' — substrate's render() shows trace/det/char-poly/solve_via_quadratic (the WHAT chain) but does NOT explain why the mathematical result holds: that det(A - λI) = 0 captures linear dependence; eigenvalues are scaling factors along invariant directions. Substrate composition (organic-thesis discipline — char_poly_coeffs reusing solve_quadratic) is engineering-WHY, not mathematical-WHY. Same WHAT-not-WHY pattern flagged at 3/5 on maths-001. Voice 4/5: same audit-trail register as maths-001. Aggregate weighted ~4.0/5 — same as maths-001; concrete cycle 2 capability lift.
